title: tagetes filiformis
intro: Tagetes filiformis, also known as Mexican Marigold or Wild Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tagetes filiformis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce inflammation and pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used as a poultice or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
